headquarters: New York, New York, United States
name: Consolidated Edison, Inc.
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. is a holding company that operates through its principal subsidiary, Consolidated Edison Company of New York, Inc. (CECONY). CECONY is one of the largest investor-owned electric utility companies in the United States, providing electric, gas, and steam service to New York City and Westchester County. The company also has other subsidiaries involved in competitive energy businesses.
